\tzpentry{ID3459}{Quantum State Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3459 introduces Quantum State Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Psi_{m,n}(r,\theta) = J_m\!\big(\alpha_{m,n}\,\tfrac{r}{R}\big)\cos(m\theta) \]
